name: container-alpine-clean
description: Maintained Alpine 3.18 image with no current CVEs. FP-control / specificity check — tsengine must not raise an actionable (high/critical) finding on a clean target.

competitors.leaderboard: Trivy / Snyk Container / Anchore — self-published only
competitors.note: Negative (specificity) test case: a clean image should produce zero high/critical CVE findings (harmless info-level base-image notes are tolerated — the severity-gated FP floor, not a brittle total-count cap). Pairs with container-nginx-vuln (sensitivity) for a recall + FP-rate read on container scanning. FP bar tracks the XBOW 'no false positives' standard.
